content: We can frame the original task-agnostic Self-Refine framework as a foundational backbone that can be augmented with multiple inconsistent perspectives from LLM self-reflection mechanisms to resolve blind spots that single-perspective self-feedback cannot catch. This creates a hybrid self-improvement system that retains Self-Refine's core advantage of requiring no extra training or supervision while fixing its limitation of repeating the same unrecognized errors across iterations.
